# Full Bloom Counseling — LLM Reference File
# https://fullbloomcounseling.com
# Last updated: April 2026

## About
Full Bloom Counseling is a licensed group therapy practice in Denver, Colorado.
Founded by Rebecca Moravec, LPC, LMFT, AAMFT Approved Supervisor, Certified Narrative
Enneagram Practitioner & Teacher. Serving Denver and all of Colorado via telehealth.

## Services
- Individual Therapy: /services/individual-therapy/
- Anxiety Therapy: /services/anxiety-therapy/
- Trauma Therapy: /services/trauma-therapy/
- Couples Therapy: /services/couples-therapy/
- Family Therapy: /services/family-therapy/
- EMDR Therapy: /services/emdr/
- Brainspotting Therapy: /services/brainspotting-therapy/
- Safe and Sound Protocol (SSP): /services/safe-and-sound/
- Disordered Eating & Body Image: /services/disordered-eating/
- Health at Every Size (HAES): /services/health-at-every-size/
- Enneagram Therapy: /services/enneagram-therapy/
- Grief & Loss Therapy: /services/grief-loss-therapy/
- Pre-Marital Counseling: /services/pre-marital/
- Postpartum & Perinatal Therapy: /services/postpartum-perinatal-therapy/
- Therapy for Women: /services/therapy-for-women-denver/
- Therapy for Young Adults: /services/therapy-young-adults-denver/
- ADHD & Neurodivergent Therapy: /services/adhd-neurodivergent-therapy-denver/
- Online Therapy (Colorado): /services/online-therapy-colorado/
- Clinical Supervision: /services/clinical-supervision/

## Team
- Rebecca Moravec, LPC, LMFT — Founder, AAMFT Approved Supervisor, Certified Narrative Enneagram Practitioner: /team/rebecca-moravec/
- Natalie Siegel, LPC — Intuitive Eating, body image, anxiety: /team/natalie-siegel/
- Mark Whitney, LPC, ACS — Trauma, relationships, supervision: /team/mark-whitney/
- Jillian Corpora, LPC — Anxiety, life transitions, young adults: /team/jillian-corpora/
- Kirsten Adorno, LPCC — Trauma, grief, culturally responsive care: /team/kirsten-adorno/
- Kelsey Bennett, LPC — EMDR, SSP, trauma, anxiety: /team/kelsey-bennett/
- Kelli Ruhl, LPC, CBP — Brainspotting (certified), trauma: /team/kelli-ruhl/
- Myldha Verdelus, LPCC — Multicultural, relationships, identity: /team/myldha-verdelus/

## Contact
Address: 1780 S Bellaire St #485, Denver, CO 80222
Phone: 720-767-9808
Email: info@fullbloomcounseling.com
Hours: Monday–Sunday 8am–7pm
Client Portal: https://rebecca-moravec.clientsecure.me/

## Approach
Weight-inclusive, anti-diet, trauma-informed, LGBTQ+ affirming, HAES-aligned.
Modalities: EMDR, Brainspotting, SSP, Narrative Therapy, Gottman Method, ACT, CBT, IFS.
Insurance: Out of network. Superbills provided. Sliding scale available.
